text.title: Glossary Management (Living Doc) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Project has ≥3 stakeholder groups AND incident traceable to terminology drift?

branch.when: stakeholder_groups >= 3 AND drift_incident_count >= 1 AND maintainer_named == true

conclusion.verdict: Stand up living-doc glossary; enforce inline-definition ban in PRDs.
Use scoped definitions per bounded context.
Cannot run living doc without single owner; name maintainer first.
Mark obsolete terms deprecated with replaced_by link; never delete.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
